high_level_description: Landscape editorial cover image for a TaraHome guide about troubleshooting Home Assistant automations that do not fire. The final cover should show a warm residential smart-home environment with the local Home Assistant hub as the practical subject.

style_description.aesthetics: clean Tara smart-home editorial, warm residential, local-first, calm and practical
style_description.constraints: no embedded headline or title text, no logos, no screenshots, no fake charts, no decorative routing/network/path line overlays
style_description.medium: photographic composite from Tara-owned site imagery
